title: ilex chengkouensis
intro: Ilex chengkouensis is a species of plant in the family Aquifoliolideae, commonly referred to as a type of holly. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ilex chengkouensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ilex chengkouensis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
